sentences.arabic: النِّيَّةُ الصَّالِحَةُ هِيَ أَسَاسُ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ يَقُومُ بِهِ الْمُسْلِمُ.
sentences.translation: Iskrena namjera je osnova svakog djela koje musliman čini.
sentences.translationEn: A righteous intention is the foundation of every deed a Muslim performs.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، حَدِيثُ ١].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama, i svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je namjerio' [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Actions are but by intentions, and every man shall have only that which he intended' [Reported by al-Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَجْعَلَ أَعْمَالَنَا خَالِصَةً لِوَجْهِ اللهِ تَعَالَى فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Moramo činiti svoja djela iskreno samo radi Allaha Uzvišenog.
sentences.translationEn: We must make our deeds sincerely for the sake of Allah the Almighty only.

sentences.arabic: إِذَا كَانَتِ النِّيَّةُ طَيِّبَةً، بَارَكَ اللهُ فِي الْعَمَلِ وَأَعْطَى صَاحِبَهُ الْأَجْرَ الْعَظِيمَ.
sentences.translation: Ako je namjera dobra, Allah će podariti bereket u tom djelu i dati vlasniku veliku nagradu.
sentences.translationEn: If the intention is good, Allah will bless the deed and give the doer a great reward.

sentences.arabic: الْإِخْلَاصُ هُوَ سِرُّ النَّجَاحِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost je tajna uspjeha na dunjaluku i ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity is the secret of success in this world and the hereafter.
